reviews.name: 감****
reviews.content:
시중에 판매되고 있는 유모차 가방 중에 젤로 예쁜것 같아요! 
쨍한 컬러 좋아하는데 요 레드컬러 진짜 튀지만 너무 예뻐서 제가 들고다니고 싶을 정도에요🥹.. 
내부에 찍찍이로 조절 가능한 칸막이가 두개 들어있는데 넣을 제품 사이즈에 따라 조절 가능해서 좋았고, 무엇보다도 수납력이 진짜 좋아서 물병이랑 간식, 핸드폰 심지어 먹다남은 음료수 진짜 밖에서 다닐때 들고가니기 귀않았는데 여기에다 딱 넣어다니면 너무 편하고 좋더라고요. 내부 원단이 간단한 생활 방수는 되서 음료수 겉에 살짝 물기가 있어도 가방이 젖지 않았어요👍
reviews.content_en: This is seriously the prettiest stroller bag I've seen on the market! 🥹 I love bright colors, and this red is so vibrant and beautiful that I actually want to carry it myself. It comes with two adjustable dividers with velcro that you can customize based on the size of what you're storing, which is great. But honestly, the storage capacity is incredible—I used to struggle carrying around a water bottle, snacks, my phone, and leftover drinks when I'm out, but now I can fit everything in here perfectly and it's so convenient. The inner fabric has basic water resistance, so even if there's a little moisture on the outside of a drink bottle, the bag doesn't get wet 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 크진 않지만 디자인이 너무 예뻐서 만족스러워요! 유모차가 가벼운 편이라 망고가 안 탔을 때 가방에 이것저것 많이 넣으면 유모차가 뒤집어지진 않을까(?) 걱정했는데 다행히 그러진 않더라고요 ㅎㅎ 잘쓰겟숩니다
reviews.content_en: It's not as big as I expected, but the design is so pretty that I'm really satisfied! I was worried that since my stroller is pretty light, putting too many things in the bag might tip it over (?), but thankfully that hasn't happened haha. I'll use it well~

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
전부터 봐뒀던 건데 블프덕분에 득템했습니다 
뭐가 필요할까 했는데 수납력 짱짱하구 
무엇보다 귀엽고 
너무 마음에 듭니다 🤍
추천합니당
reviews.content_en: I'd been eyeing this for a while and finally got it thanks to Black Friday sales! I wasn't sure what I'd need it for, but the storage capacity is seriously amazing, and most importantly it's super cute. I love it so much 🤍 Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 키****
reviews.content: 세일 많이 해서 샀어요. 예쁘고 내부 구성도 좋아여. 다만 지퍼라서 약간 불편할것 같지만 대체적으로 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it because they had a lot of sales going on. It's pretty and the interior organization is nice. The only thing is the zipper feels a bit inconvenient, but overall I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
예쁜건 못참쥬
맘에들오요 물건도 많이 들어가요
reviews.content_en: I can't resist something pretty~ I love it and it fits so much stuff!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 개모차 가방으로 활용도가 좋을 것 같아서 구매했어요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it for use as a dog stroller bag because it seemed really practical!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 제품도 튼튼하고 수납력이 짱이에요~ 그리고 너무 이뻐요~ 이쁜 유모차 가방 못찾다가 우연히 발견해서 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: The product is sturdy and the storage capacity is amazing~ And it's so pretty~ I couldn't find a cute stroller bag anywhere, but I accidentally discovered this one and bought it!
